title: COMMUNITY BUILDERS PROGRAM - 211info
text: REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC COMMUNITY BUILDERS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides minor home and safety repairs. Staff, volunteers, and subcontractors complete repairs as resources are available. Services may include home assessments, smoke/fire alarms, carbon monoxide detectors, bathroom safety aids, address housing code violations, yard nuisances, minor plumbing, and electrical repairs. Also assists with referrals to other home repair programs. 4150 S Moody Avenue Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: -Age 55 and older and/or adults with a permanent disability -Must own and occupy home needing the repairs -50% of area median income or less Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 501-5719 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (503) 501-5719 Community Builders Program Reception (503) 231-0682 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information. Visit website to fill out application. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of age and/or disability, proof of income, and proof of home ownership LANGUAGES: Phone: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement Online Applications: English, Spanish, Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Older Adults Home Rehabilitation Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home Rehabilitation Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC
